_about: Plain-language summaries + topic tags per publication, keyed by DOI. Picked up by build_html.py and rendered into publications.html. Topics drive the filter buttons; recognised values: cancer, nanomed, chem, delivery, review, thesis. A pub can carry multiple space-separated topics.

10.3390/ph17030315.tldr: A landscape review of nanomedicine platforms used in smart chemotherapy. Maps how surface chemistry, stimulus-responsive carriers, and combination approaches are being used to lower off-target toxicity.

10.3390/ph16040539.tldr: We show how excipient choice changes the immediate-release profile of generic metformin HCl tablets, with practical implications for formulation re-validation.

10.3390/polym16050643.tldr: First-author work on a theophylline controlled-release matrix system combining poloxamer 407, stearyl alcohol, and HPMC. Reports a formulation that survives multi-batch dissolution-profile testing.

10.1016/j.compbiomed.2025.110156.tldr: A methodological audit of tumour-progression ML papers, showing how weak validation choices inflate apparent performance and what an honest benchmark would look like in oncology.

10.12688/f1000research.140607.1.tldr: Effect of enteric-coating film on the delayed release of pantoprazole gastro-resistant generic tablets. Walks through the formulation choices that survived re-validation across batches.

10.1080/0972060x.2022.2072177.tldr: GC-MS characterisation of UAE-grown rosemary essential oil. Reports the major-constituent profile and contrasts it with regional sources.

10.3390/ph17030271.tldr: First-author follow-up on theophylline controlled-release tablets. Examines how hydration forms and polymer grades change release kinetics and how to control for them in formulation work.

10.1007/s44446-025-00046-y.tldr: First-author review of inhalable nanoparticle-based drug delivery for non-small cell lung cancer. Maps the design choices that improve targeting and the translational gaps still in the way.

10.1080/17476348.2025.2582244.tldr: First-author work on spatially resolved airway niches in asthma, mapping epithelial-immune microenvironments that shape disease heterogeneity.

10.3390/ijms262211029.tldr: Review of thymoquinone as a targeted cancer therapy. Walks through molecular mechanisms and the clinical prospects that depend on solving the formulation problem.

10.3390/molecules30214181.tldr: Discovery of small ERK5 inhibitors through structure-based virtual screening, biological evaluation, and MD simulations. Reports candidates that survived in-vitro validation.

10.69709/cellengc.2025.115467.tldr: Synergistic modulation of ER stress combined with insulin potentiation therapy for enhanced cancer treatment. Reports a combination strategy validated across cancer cell lines.

10.1080/15376516.2026.2628929.tldr: We use AutoGluon to predict drug-drug interactions and show that automated model search with molecular fingerprints can match handcrafted pipelines while staying simple to reproduce.

10.1007/s00520-026-10389-4.tldr: Cross-sectional survey of public perceptions of AI-assisted cancer care in Abu Dhabi. Reports attitudes, trust gaps, and the demographic patterns that shape adoption.

10.1016/j.xphs.2025.104147.tldr: First-author review of large language models in drug delivery. Covers what LLM-powered tools currently do for formulation and what would have to be true before they replace manual triage.
